hero.title: THE FUTURE OF MARKETING IS NOT HUMAN
hero.subtitle: AI-powered campaigns. Hyperrealistic models. Unlimited creativity.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to launch AI-powered campaigns that outperform traditional production.

photography.title: AI Photography
photography.description: Complete photo sessions without cameras or studios. Our AI models are indistinguishable from real people. We generate editorial images with the quality of Vogue, Harper's Bazaar or GQ.

video.title: AI Video Production
video.description: Cinematic videos generated with cutting-edge AI. From 15-second reels to 2-minute ad spots. Professional editing: color grading, transitions, voiceover and music.

strategy.title: AI Campaign Strategy
strategy.description: Complete AI-powered marketing campaigns. From creative concept to visual execution, including distribution strategy. Each campaign includes brief, creative concepts, art direction and content calendar.

models.title: AI Model Creation
models.description: Hyperrealistic virtual people you can use as brand ambassadors or virtual influencers. Each model is AI-trained for perfect consistency across any scenario, pose or outfit. Works 24/7, never ages.

social.title: AI Social Media
social.description: We automate your social media presence with AI-generated visual content. Each post includes hyperrealistic images created specifically for your brand, persuasive copy and hashtag strategy.

branding.title: AI Brand Identity
branding.description: Complete brand identities powered by AI. From logo to packaging mockups, everything generated with premium aesthetics. Includes 20 brand images ready for web, social and print.

services.individualSubtitle: Need something specific? Choose exactly what you need.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Premium results.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: The perfect starting point for small businesses and personal brands testing AI marketing.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing brands ready to scale their content production with AI.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Full-service AI marketing for mid-size companies demanding excellence.
features: Strategy with KPIs and monthly reporting

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Enterprise-grade. Dedicated team, unlimited production, custom SLAs.

items.a: Our images go through a 4-step refinement pipeline including pore-level skin texture, facial restoration, and professional upscaling. The result is indistinguishable from a real photograph. Our golden rule: if it looks AI, it doesn't leave our studio.
Depending on the plan: 48h for Scale and Enterprise, 3-5 days for Growth, 5-7 days for Starter. Individual services are delivered in 3-5 business days.

items.q: Can I use the images commercially?
items.a: Yes, all images and videos we create are your exclusive property with full commercial license. Use them in advertising, social media, web, print and any other medium.

items.q: How does a custom AI model work?
items.a: We create a unique virtual person for your brand, AI-trained to always have exactly the same face, complexion and features in any scenario, pose or outfit. It's like having an exclusive model that works 24/7.

items.q: What if I don't like the result?
items.a: Each delivery includes revisions (2 to unlimited depending on the plan). Plus, every image goes through our automated quality control system that evaluates photorealism, anatomy, lighting and texture before sending it to you.

items.q: Can I cancel my monthly plan?
items.a: Yes, you can cancel at any time. No lock-in. Individual services are paid per project.

cta.title: Your next campaign doesn't need a casting call.

founder.title: Founded by D Business Group ES
founder.description: We believe AI is not just the future of marketing — it is the present. Our mission is to make hyperrealistic AI content accessible to every brand, eliminating the barriers of traditional production while delivering results that are indistinguishable from reality.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe the future of marketing is AI-native. NeuroBulls exists to make that future accessible to every brand — delivering campaigns with hyperrealistic AI models that are faster, more affordable, and infinitely more scalable than traditional production.

technology.title: Our Technology
technology.description: We leverage cutting-edge generative AI to create photorealistic models that are indistinguishable from real people. Our proprietary pipeline ensures consistency across hundreds of images and videos — the same AI model, the same identity, infinite scenarios.

cost.title: 60-85% Cost Savings
cost.description: No models, no studios, no stylists. Digital production at a fraction of the cost.

speed.title: 10x Faster Delivery
speed.description: Complete campaigns in days, not weeks. React to trends in 24 hours.

consistency.title: Perfect Consistency
consistency.description: Your AI model never ages, never changes. Same identity across 1000 campaigns.

scale.title: Infinite Scalability
scale.description: Generate 100 variations for A/B testing at the cost of one. Adapt to any market instantly.

contact.title: Let's Create Together
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll craft a tailored AI marketing solution.
